author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Jack Quaid plays Phranque in God of War Laufey.
Learn more about this earnest cosmic cube on PlayStation Blog.

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Starseeker: Astroneer Expeditions - Launch Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/en-us/concept/10014866

Join the ESS Starseeker crew to explore strange new worlds and work together with friends. Complete planet-wide objectives on timed Expeditions before returning to safety aboard the Station. Collect and unlock powerful tech to help the crew tackle the perils of space!

#ps5 #ps5games #starseeker

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Duskfade - Exclusive in-depth Gameplay Walkthrough Trailer | PS5 Games
Duskfade coming on PS5 August 13th. Wishlist Now!

Exclusive gameplay walkthrough out now. Here's your first real look at how Duskfade plays. New biomes, special abilities, unlockable gadgets and a boss fight you won't forget. 

#ps5 #ps5games

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Overwatch - Shion: New Hero Gameplay Trailer | PS5 & PS4 Games
https://www.playstation.com/games/overwatch/

You don’t become the leader of the Hashimoto by playing it safe. 

Introducing Shion - the newest hitscan Damage Hero joining the roster and the next major player in the Reign of Talon. 

Armed with dual semi-auto pistols, an omnidirectional dash, and a motorcycle she can throw, Shion thrives in dangerous situations with nothing to lose and everything to gain. 

Join her as she paints the town red when Season 3: Into the Tiger’s Den launches on June 16. 

#ps5 #ps5games #ps4 #ps4games #overwatch2

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Woodo - Demo available now! | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/product/EP8923-PPSA37290_00-WOODODEMOPS5X000

Woodo is a cozy diorama puzzle game where you assemble wooden scenes piece by piece. As you place objects in their correct spots, each scene slowly fills with color and comes to life, revealing charming animations and small surprises. Try out the demo, available now on PlayStation. Woodo will release later this summer!

#ps5 #ps5games

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Warhammer 40,000: Rogue Trader The Infinite Museion - Launch Trailer | PS5 Games
The Infinite Museion, the third story expansion for Warhammer 40,000: Rogue Trader, draws you into the iconic vault of Trazyn the Infinite and is available now on PS5. Pursue rare artefacts, enhance yourself with augmentations, and choose whether to serve the designs of one of the galaxy’s most infamous collectors or oppose him.

#ps5 #ps5games

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
God of War Laufey blends classic and modern God of War combat
A lethal and fluid gameplay loop

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
007 First Light Limited Edition DualSense Controller - Available Now | PS5 & PC Games
Style. Power. Precision. Make your name and earn the number with the 007 First Light limited edition DualSense® wireless controller.

Featuring a golden sheen and radiant barrel design framing Bond’s iconic codename and weapon, this limited edition controller is well suited for a fresh agent looking to make a name for themselves.

Available now at https://direct.playstation.com/en-us/ as well as from select retailers. 

#ps5 #ps5games #pc #pcgames

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
CleanSheet Soccer 2 - Launch Trailer | PS VR2 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10018883/

CleanSheet Soccer 2 is out now on PlayStation VR2! Step back between the posts in the sequel to CleanSheet Soccer and build your career as a goalkeeper in Career Mode.

Take on new drills, sharpen your reflexes, create custom shot challenges in Shot Creator, and test yourself in Match Play as you rise through the ranks. Whether you’re chasing the perfect save or pushing for the next level, every shot is a chance to prove yourself.

Your goalkeeping journey starts here.

#ps5 #psvr2games #psvr2 #psvrgames #cleansheet2 #cleansheetsoccer2

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Beastro - Launch Trailer | PS5 Games
Beastro is OUT NOW on PlayStation 5!

https://store.playstation.com/en-gb/concept/10017655/

Not all heroes wield swords. Some prefer the spoon. 🍲✨

Welcome to Beastro, a heartwarming culinary adventure where great food can change the world. Step into the shoes of a chef, gather fresh ingredients, craft delicious meals, and help prepare the brave Caretakers of Palo Pori for the journeys ahead.

Build your restaurant, discover new recipes, and prove that sometimes the best way to save the world is with a really good meal! 

#ps5 #ps5games

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Unrailed 2: Back on Track - Launch Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10015599/

All aboard!
Unrailed 2: Back on Track is OUT NOW on PlayStation 5!

Get ready for multiplayer mayhem as you work together to build tracks, survive chaotic biomes and try to avoid a locomotive loss! Explore procedurally generated worlds, upgrade your train and work together with one goal: Keep the train moving at all costs!

Play solo or team up locally and online today!

#ps5 #ps5games #unrailed2

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Fortnite Days of Play PlayStation Cup Finals
Get ready to watch the Fortnite Days of Play PlayStation Cup Finals! Players in the finals will get a chance to claim a piece of the massive $200,000 prize pool. Learn more: https://www.playstation.com/en-us/tournaments/
#ps5 #ps5games #fortnite

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Alien: Isolation 2 Reveal Trailer - Last Chance | PS5 Games
"A powerful executive lectures her new subordinate. The company is watching, and failure is not an option.

"Your mistake. It was expensive. That’s something the company rarely forgives. This is your last chance. 
Do you understand?"

#ps5 #ps5games #AlienIsolation2

May contain content inappropriate for children. Visit www.esrb.org for rating information.

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Kalanoro - Gameplay Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10018391

Video Description (Consumer Facing):
📅 Launching August 27, 2026 on PlayStation 5.

Kalanoro is a colorful action-adventure inspired by Malagasy folklore, where you'll recruit legendary lemur musicians, grow your band's fame across Lemuria, and challenge the evil witch Raneny in a quest to save the island—one song at a time. 🎶🐒

🎤 Jyeuhair joins the adventure as a special guest in the demo!

Experience a brand-new Live Music Performance featuring an original song composed exclusively for Kalanoro, performed alongside Kalakely in a unique in-game musical event.

🎵 Original Music
Jason Rhobinson
© Universal Music Publishing, Push It Group

🎮 *Play the Demo!*

#ps5 #ps5games
